_comment: IMPORTANT: All channel_ids in this registry MUST be verified by a human or via the YouTube Data API before use. Do NOT guess or fabricate 24-character channel IDs. Leave channel_id blank until verified. trust_level 'needs_review' means the channel_id has NOT been confirmed.
name: Huberman Lab
notes: Andrew Huberman's science-based health and performance podcast. channel_id must be verified via YouTube API or manually before use.

name: The School of Greatness
notes: Lewis Howes' interview-based show on peak performance and mindset. channel_id must be verified.

name: The Tim Ferriss Show
notes: Tim Ferriss' world-class interviews with performers. channel_id must be verified.

name: Diary Of A CEO
notes: Steven Bartlett's long-form interviews. channel_id must be verified.

name: Rich Roll
notes: Rich Roll's podcast covering wellness, plant-based performance, and meaning. channel_id must be verified.

name: Modern Wisdom
notes: Chris Williamson's show on psychology, philosophy, and self-development. channel_id must be verified.

name: Impact Theory
notes: Tom Bilyeu's mindset and identity-focused interviews. channel_id must be verified.

name: TED
notes: Official TED main channel. channel_id must be verified.

name: TEDx Talks
notes: Official TEDx independently-organized events channel. channel_id must be verified.

name: SAMPLE_TRUSTED_FOR_TESTS_ONLY
notes: SYNTHETIC TEST FIXTURE ONLY — NOT a real channel. This entry exists solely so the mock-mode test can exercise an official-channel match against a known channel_id. Do not use in production.
